Hero.description: Mechelin Metals Nigeria — sourcing, sorting, baling and distributing aluminium and non-ferrous metals to manufacturers across West Africa and the world.

About.title: NIGERIA'S FOREMOST INTEGRATED METAL RECYCLER
About.description1: Mechelin Metals Nigeria LTD leverages captive resources and advanced capabilities to source, sort and bale aluminium waste, distributing it as raw material to manufacturers. We handle all types of non-ferrous metals for sale, scrapping, conversion and foundry purposes.
About.description2: Formally incorporated in 2023, our team has been active in the industry for over a decade — building infrastructure and global distribution networks that benefit both industry and environment.

WhyChoose.title: WHY CHOOSE
WhyChoose.intro: Trusted by heavy manufacturers and industrial foundries across four continents to deliver processed metal cargo exactly to assay specifications.
WhyChoose.expertDesc: Our team comprises seasoned metals specialists with deep knowledge of ferrous and non-ferrous material grading, processing standards, and export regulations.
WhyChoose.experienceDesc: Over 10 years of operational excellence in metals sourcing, processing, and international trade from Nigeria to global markets.
WhyChoose.globalDesc: Established trade relationships with buyers in China, South Korea, India, and across West Africa — ensuring your materials reach the right markets.
WhyChoose.logisticsDesc: Full container loading, freight forwarding, documentation, and port clearance services managed by our in-house logistics team.
WhyChoose.paymentDesc: We support Letters of Credit (LC), T/T Bank Transfers, and other internationally recognized payment instruments for seamless global trade.
WhyChoose.sustainabilityDesc: Our recycling processes meet international environmental standards, supporting your company's ESG goals and sustainability commitments.

GlobalReach.title: OUR
GlobalReach.intro: Facilitating heavy industrial metal distribution channels out of West Africa directly into primary processing centers across China, South Korea, and India.
GlobalReach.nigeriaDesc: Headquarters & sourcing infrastructure across active industrial collection zones in Anambra, Lagos, and Port Harcourt.
GlobalReach.chinaDesc: Primary industrial destination — delivering certified aluminium, ferrous profiles, and mixed scrap directly to large-scale smelting plants.
GlobalReach.southKoreaDesc: Premium grade heavy steel and specialty foundry casting components supplied consistently to corporate manufacturing hubs.
GlobalReach.indiaDesc: High-purity non-ferrous and structured shredder scrap exports supporting growing national automotive and infrastructure pipelines.

materials.title: OUR
materials.ctaText: We supply industrial-grade metals on demand.

aluminum.name: Aluminum
aluminum.desc: High-purity aluminum scrap ideal for smelting and reprocessing. Available in various grades including 6061 and 6063.

castAluminum.name: Cast Aluminum
castAluminum.desc: Engine blocks, transmission housings, and industrial cast aluminum components for remelting into new alloy products.

ironSteel.name: Iron & Steel
ironSteel.desc: Heavy melting scrap (HMS 1&2), shredded steel, and structural iron for electric arc furnaces and foundry use.

condenser.name: Condenser
condenser.desc: Air-conditioning and refrigeration condensers with high copper-aluminum content for efficient material recovery.

ubcCans.name: UBC Cans
ubcCans.desc: Baled used beverage cans — one of the most recycled aluminum products globally, ideal for remelting into new sheet material.

ferrousMetals.name: Ferrous Metals
ferrousMetals.desc: Comprehensive range of iron-based scrap including structural steel, rebar, plate steel, and industrial equipment scrap.

nonFerrousMetals.name: Non-Ferrous Metals
nonFerrousMetals.desc: Copper, brass, bronze, lead, and zinc in various forms — wires, pipes, fittings, and sheets — ready for processing.

vehicleScrap.name: Vehicle Scrap
vehicleScrap.desc: End-of-life vehicles stripped and processed — engine blocks, body panels, axles, and mixed metal recovery from automotive sources.

footer.brandDescription: West Africa's foremost integrated metal recycling company — sourcing, sorting and distributing high-performance recycled raw materials nationally and globally.

whatWeDeal.title: Our Major Metals
whatWeDeal.description: We trade, recycle, and supply premium-quality metals for industrial applications. Each grade is processed to meet strict specification standards.

aluminium.name: Aluminium
aluminium.desc: Premium-grade sorted aluminium scrap, bailed and ready for smelting or direct manufacturing use.

castAluminium.name: Cast Aluminium
castAluminium.desc: High-purity cast aluminium sourced from engines, machinery, and automotive components.

castIron.name: Cast Iron
castIron.desc: Sorted cast iron scrap suitable for foundry operations and metal reprocessing.

condenser.name: Condenser
condenser.desc: Copper and aluminium condensers from HVAC and refrigeration equipment, carefully processed.

ubc.name: UBC
ubc.desc: Used Beverage Cans — cleaned, sorted, and bailed aluminium UBC for recycling.

nonFerrous.name: Non-Ferrous Metals
nonFerrous.desc: Magnetic and non-magnetic ferrous metals from vehicles, buildings, and appliances.

hero.description: A decade of heavy industry operations, institutionalised for the global market. Nigeria's premier integrated metal reclamation, industrial extraction, and multi-continent distribution enterprise.

story.title: MORE THAN A DECADE IN THE MAKING
story.paragraph1: Mechelin Metals Nigeria LTD is West Africa's foremost integrated structural reclamation and metal processing corporation. While formally incorporated in 2023, our foundation spans over ten years of deep operational deployment across active recycling, sorting, and supply chains.
story.paragraph2: We leverage captive resources and institutional machinery infrastructures to source, safely process, and non-ferrous variants. Our materials feed directly into precision manufacturing lines, foundries, and domestic smelting conglomerates.

visionMission.visionBody: To become the leading provider of sustainable metals recycling solutions globally — driving the circular economy through innovation, safety, and superior material recovery.
visionMission.missionBody: To revolutionize metal recycling by turning waste into high-quality raw materials through technological innovation and sustainable practices that benefit the environment.

2013.title: Industrial Market Entry
2013.event: Initial deployment and asset sourcing across active West African heavy scrap sectors.

2018.title: Infrastructure Expansion
2018.event: Established regional consolidation hubs and primary partnerships with local manufacturers.

2022.title: Global Forwarding Channels
2022.event: Launched cross-border maritime logistics pipelines supplying heavy industries across Asia.

2023.title: Corporate Incorporation
2023.event: Formally integrated operations under Mechelin Metals Nigeria LTD.

2024.title: Processing Scalability
2024.event: Commissioned industrial baling machinery, significantly expanding processing capacities.

2026.title: Digital Procurement Infrastructure
2026.event: Launched enterprise-grade B2B platform for seamless global supplier and buyer routing.

sections.whyTitle: WHY BULK BUYERS ROUTE THROUGH MECHELIN

services.title: Metal Sourcing & Collection
services.desc: Extensive sourcing network across West Africa to collect scrap from auto wreckers, demolition sites, factories and households.

services.title: Sorting & Classification
services.desc: Manual and mechanical separation of all metals by type, grade, and purity — ensuring clean, contamination-free batches.
features: Separation of aluminium, copper, brass, lead

services.title: Baling & Processing
services.desc: Post-sorting, metals are cleaned, cut to specification and compressed into high-density bales ready for smelting or export.

services.title: Logistics & Delivery
services.desc: Full logistics from our Anambra facility to your site — domestic manufacturer or international importer.

services.title: National & Global Distribution
services.desc: Supply of high-performance recycled raw materials to manufacturers domestically and internationally.

services.title: B2B Bulk Supply Contracts
services.desc: For manufacturers requiring consistent high-volume supply — structured contracts with guaranteed volumes and timelines.

services.title: Scrap Metal Consultation
services.desc: Not sure what to do with your industrial scrap? We assess, classify and recommend the optimal recycling or sale route.

services.title: Custom Material Preparation
services.desc: Metals prepared to exact buyer specifications — for foundry feed, smelter charge or export grade.

whyPoints.title: Integrated Operations
whyPoints.desc: We directly manage full recovery pipelines, clearing out intermediate trading layers to anchor high efficiency.

whyPoints.title: Consistent Purity Criteria
whyPoints.desc: Strict grading guidelines and rigorous QA ensure allocations fulfill designated purity specs on every run.

whyPoints.title: Sustained Cargo Capacities
whyPoints.desc: Our industrial-scale footprint ensures high-volume bulk requests are matched continuously month after month.

whyPoints.title: Adaptable Execution Terms
whyPoints.desc: We engineer transactional criteria around your procurement layout, offering spot purchasing and structured terms.

whyPoints.title: Environmental Framework Compliance
whyPoints.desc: Every operational process generates data frameworks to bolster your modern corporate sustainability objectives.

serviceCta.subtitle: Bulk Industrial Supply
serviceCta.title: DISCUSS YOUR METALLURGICAL OVERHEADS?
serviceCta.description: From isolated custom processing batches to dedicated corporate mill allocation setups — we engineer strategic answers suited to your parameters.
serviceCta.trustText: Trusted by industrial buyers across West Africa
